home.lede: We believe a smile is more than just beauty — it represents health and self-confidence. That's why we focus on education, oral hygiene and long-lasting results.
home.hero_lede: Modern equipment. Skilled hands. Care that fits you.
home.logos_title: Top companies trust us with their services
home.services_title: Comprehensive Dental Services for Every Need
home.services_lede: Dentaris Digital Dental Clinic is more than just a dental clinic — it is a place where healthy, confident, and radiant smiles are crafted with care, expertise, and precision. Designed with a modern approach to dentistry, our clinic combines advanced technology, gentle techniques, and personalized treatment plans to ensure that every patient enjoys a comfortable and effective dental experience.
home.why_trust_title: Why patients trust us with their care
home.why_trust_lede: We create experiences that make you feel cared for, confident and comfortable. Our commitment to excellence, advanced technology, and personalized treatment plans set us apart.
why_trust_items: Cosmetic dentistry, orthodontics and oral surgery.
Skilled dentists and specialists for personalized care.
Modern equipment and minimally invasive methods.
home.care_lede: We don't just treat teeth — we build trust. Every interaction is designed to feel simple, calm and transparent.

care_cards.title: Insurance Support
care_cards.body: Flexible payment options compatible with private and employer insurance.

care_cards.title: Expert Dentists
care_cards.body: 10+ years of experience and internationally trained specialists.

care_cards.title: Pain-free Experience
care_cards.body: Modern anesthesia and a calm environment — your comfort comes first.

home.process_title: Book a visit in just 3 steps
home.process_lede: Simple, fast, transparent. No phone tag, no email required.

process_steps.title: Pick your service
process_steps.body: From family check-ups to implants — choose the area you need.

process_steps.title: Choose a doctor & time
process_steps.body: Pick from available dentists and open time slots that fit your schedule.

process_steps.title: Confirm and visit
process_steps.body: Drop your name and phone — your appointment is locked in. We send an SMS reminder.

home.testimonial_lede: Real reactions from patients who walked through our doors.

testimonials.quote: I used to be terrified of the dentist. Dentaris changed that. The dentist explained every step, and the treatment was completely painless. I love smiling again.
testimonials.name: B. Enkhjargal

testimonials.quote: Brought my kid in — they were so warm and patient. He thought he was playing the whole time and got his check-up done. He actually wants to go back!
testimonials.name: S. Tuya

testimonials.quote: Got an implant. Three months later — feels like my own tooth. Honest pricing, real care. Highly recommend.
testimonials.name: D. Batbayar

home.doctors_lede: Our dentists treat each patient with empathy and honesty. Their experience is the foundation of your trust.

welcome_offer.title: New to Dentaris? Enjoy a Special Welcome Offer.
welcome_offer.body: Initial check-up + cleaning — 50% off. Book your visit online and meet your new dentist with peace of mind.
welcome_offer.note: New patients only. Valid through December 2026.

trust_items.title: We listen first
trust_items.body: We won't rush to a verdict. Tell us what's going on; the diagnosis comes second.

trust_items.title: Honest pricing
trust_items.body: Transparent fees. No surprise charges or hidden line items.

trust_items.title: Modern diagnostics
trust_items.body: International-standard equipment and an in-house lab.

cta_band.title: Book tomorrow's visit, today.
cta_band.body: 30 seconds. No phone tag. No email required.

about.title: Modern technology, real human care
about.lede: Dentaris Digital Dental Clinic opened in 2009 in the heart of Ulaanbaatar. From day one we have insisted on a simple idea: every patient is a person before they are a case.
about.mission_body: To deliver calm, attentive, world-class dental care to anyone who walks through our doors — without the cold corridor feeling.
about.featured_lede: Limited-time offers running this month. Book now to lock in your discount.

values.title: One person at a time
values.body: We will not interrupt you mid-sentence. The conversation finishes before the chart opens.

values.title: Evidence-led
values.body: We read journals weekly. Treatment follows the data, not the year you trained.

values.title: Follow-up included
values.body: We check in after the visit. You are not on your own once the door closes.

timeline.title: Founded
timeline.body: Started as a small clinic with one treatment room.

timeline.title: New location
timeline.body: Opened our flagship in Sukhbaatar district.

timeline.title: Digital transformation
timeline.body: 3D scanners and digital smile design rolled out.

timeline.title: 12,000+ patients
timeline.body: Highest-rated dental clinic in independent surveys.

doctors.title: Our dentists
doctors.bio_fallback: An experienced dentist who works one-on-one with each patient on a personalized treatment plan.

services.title: Our dental services
services.lede: From routine family check-ups to cosmetic and implant work — every dental service under one roof.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.lede: Questions, ideas, or feedback — drop us a line. Bookings, general queries — we get back fast.

Branch №1: Bayanzurkh Tower, Floor 4, Sukhbaatar District, Khoroo 1
Branch №2: West of the Central Post Office, Khoroo 4, Chingeltei District

contact.address2: Branch №2 — West of the Central Post Office, Khoroo 4, Chingeltei District
contact.locations_lede: Two locations in the city centre — parking available, comfortable spaces.
contact.branch1_addr: Sukhbaatar District, Khoroo 1, Bayanzurkh Tower, Floor 4
contact.form_lede: Tell us about your experience, suggestions or concerns. We read every message and reply.
contact.success_lede: We'll reply as soon as we can. Thank you!

booking.book_title: Pick a dental service and lock in your time
booking.book_lede: Choose from 9 dental service areas at Dentaris Dental Clinic. Booking takes under 60 seconds — no phone tag, no email required.
booking.book_help_title: Not sure which dental service to pick?
booking.book_help_body: Our dentists will guide you to the right service based on your situation and book your visit.
booking.step_dept_lede: Which kind of care are you looking for?
booking.step_doctor_lede: We will show their open times next.
booking.step_slot_lede: All times are Ulaanbaatar local time. Once you pick, we go to the confirmation step.
booking.step_form_lede: Just two fields — so we can reach you if anything changes.
booking.field_notes_ph: e.g. headaches for the past 3 days
booking.no_slots: No openings this week. Try next week.
booking.success_lede: We'll call the number below if anything changes. Please screenshot this page.

errors.slot_already_booked: Sorry — that slot was just taken by someone else. Please pick another.
errors.patient_phone_invalid: Phone must be +976 followed by 8 digits.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

auth.login_lede: Sign in to manage your appointments and details.
auth.signup_lede: Create an account to book and track your visits online.
auth.name: Full name
auth.success_signup: Account created. Please check your email to verify.
auth.password_short: Password must be at least 6 characters.

footer.intro: A modern dental clinic powered by digital technology. Comfortable, attentive care for everyone.
